stage1.prompt: 选出 hen 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 母鸡（rooster/cock 公鸡，chick 小鸡。三个词一起记）
learn.example: The hen lays eggs every morning.

stage1.q: She was so tired that she ___ asleep in class.

learn.meaning: gram. fall 过去式是 fell（不规则）！不是 falled！felt 是 feel 的过去式，意思完全不同。
learn.example: She fell asleep quickly. (NOT: falled / felt)

stage1.prompt: 选出 dolphin 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 海豚（注意：dolphin 和 shark 都是海洋动物，经常在同一篇文章出现，不要搞混）
learn.example: Dolphins are very smart animals.

stage1.prompt: 选出 blind 的正确用法
stage1.q: The old dog is ___ in one eye.

learn.meaning: adj. 瞎的；失明的。be blind in + 部位。不说 a blind。
learn.example: He is blind in one eye. (NOT: He is a blind.)

stage1.prompt: 选出 scared 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 害怕；恐惧（scared 指人感到害怕；scary 指事物令人害怕。和 bored/boring 是同一规则）
learn.example: I'm scared of sharks. / Sharks are scary.

stage1.prompt: 选出 grey 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 灰色的（英式 grey，美式 gray，两种拼写都对）
learn.example: The dolphin's skin is grey.

options: Dolphins are friendly, but sharks are scared.
Dolphins are friendly, but sharks are scary.
Dolphins is friendly, but sharks is scary.
Dolphin are friendly, but shark are scary.

learn.meaning: gram. 鲨鱼是令人害怕的→scary（不是 scared）。主语是复数→Dolphins are / Sharks are。
learn.example: Dolphins are friendly, but sharks are scary.

stage1.prompt: 选出 asleep 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 睡着（表语形容词，只能放在 be/fall 后面，不能放在名词前！不说 an asleep boy，要说 a sleeping boy）
learn.example: The baby is asleep. → a sleeping baby

stage1.prompt: 选出 shark 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 鲨鱼（dolphin 海豚 vs shark 鲨鱼，海洋阅读最常见混淆对）
learn.example: Some people are scared of sharks.

stage1.prompt: 选出 fall asleep 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 入睡；睡着（fall-fell-fallen + asleep。表示"入睡的过程"）
learn.example: I fell asleep as soon as I lay down.

stage1.prompt: 选出 scared 和 scary 的区别
stage1.q: The movie was ___. I felt ___ after watching it.

learn.meaning: gram. -ing 形容事物（令人害怕），-ed 形容人的感受（感到害怕）。和 boring/bored 完全一样。
learn.example: The shark is scary. I am scared of the shark.

stage1.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查 asleep 的用法）
stage1.q: 小狗是瞎的，但它很快就睡着了。
options: The puppy is blind, but it felt asleep quickly.
The puppy is a blind, but it fell asleep quickly.
The puppy is blind, but it falled asleep quickly.
The puppy is blind, but it fell asleep quickly.

learn.meaning: gram. 四个考点：①blind 是形容词，不加 a（不是 a blind）②fall 过去式 fell（不是 falled）③felt 是 feel 的过去式（不是"入睡"）④asleep 是表语形容词
learn.example: The puppy is blind, but it fell asleep quickly.

stage2.q: The ___ at the front desk greeted every ___ with a smile.

learn.meaning: 语境：前台接待员迎接房客。receptionist 接待员 + guest 房客，是最自然的搭配。
learn.example: The receptionist greeted every guest warmly.

stage2.prompt: 选出 team 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 组；班（a team of + 复数名词，谓语可用单数或复数）。search-and-rescue team 搜救队。
learn.example: A team of firemen arrived at the scene.

stage2.prompt: 选出 wool 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n.（羊等的）毛；羊毛。不可数名词。woolen 羊毛制的（形容词）。
learn.example: This sweater is made of wool. → a woolen sweater

stage2.q: 消防队员组成搜救队，为社区提供服务。
options: Firemen form a search-and-rescue team and provide service to the community.
Firemans form a search-and-rescue team and provide services to the community.
Firemen form a search-and-rescue team and provide services to the community.
Fireman form a search-and-rescue team and provides services to the community.

learn.meaning: gram. ①fireman 复数 firemen ②主语 firemen 复数→动词原形 form 和 provide ③service 可数，services 复数
learn.example: Firemen form a team and provide services.

stage2.prompt: 选出 fire engine 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 消防车（engine 指引擎/车头，不是"消防发动机"）。不要和 fire truck（美式）混淆，两者都指消防车。
learn.example: The fire engine arrived in five minutes.

stage2.q: 关于 sir 和 Mr 的区别
options: Both A and B are correct.

learn.meaning: gram. sir 单独使用（Good morning, sir.），后面不跟姓氏。Mr 后面必须跟姓氏（Mr Smith）。sir 不大写（除非在句首），Mr 始终首字母大写。
learn.example: Good morning, sir. / Good morning, Mr Smith.

stage2.prompt: 选出 receptionist 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 接待员（reception 接待处 + ist 做……的人。在酒店/医院/公司前台工作的人）
learn.example: The receptionist at the hotel was very helpful.

stage2.prompt: 选出 fireman 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 消防队员（复数 firemen，不是 firemans）
learn.example: The fireman saved the child from the fire.

stage2.prompt: 选出 sir 的正确用法

learn.meaning: n. 先生（单独用，对男性的尊称。不和姓氏连用。Mr 后面必须加姓氏）。Good morning, sir. (NOT: Good morning, Mr.)
learn.example: Excuse me, sir. Can I ask a question?

stage2.prompt: 选出 guest 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 旅客；房客（酒店用语）。反义 host 主人。guest room 客房。
learn.example: The hotel can hold up to 200 guests.

stage2.prompt: 选出 search-and-rescue 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 搜索救援（固定搭配，三个词用连字符。search 搜索 + rescue 救援）
learn.example: The search-and-rescue team saved many lives.

stage2.prompt: 选出 service 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 服务（serve v. 服务 → service n.）。search-and-rescue service 搜救服务。
learn.example: The hotel provides excellent service.

stage3.prompt: 选出 guard 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 守卫；保卫。guard against 防范……。guard dog 看门狗。
learn.example: The dog guards the house at night.

stage3.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查 apologize 和 allow）
stage3.q: 他为未经允许就进入而道歉。
options: He apologized for entering without allowing.
He apologized for entering without allowing to.
He apologized to enter without being allowed.
He apologized for entering without being allowed.

learn.meaning: gram. ①apologize for + V-ing ②"未经允许"用被动 without being allowed（没有被告知允许 = 没被允许）③without 是介词
learn.example: He apologized for entering without being allowed.

stage3.prompt: 选出 apologize 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 道歉。不及物动词！后接 for：apologize for sth/doing sth。名词 apology。
learn.example: He apologized for being late. (NOT: apologized being late)

stage3.prompt: 选出 lead 的过去式
stage3.q: The receptionist ___ us to our room yesterday.

learn.meaning: gram. lead 过去式是 led（不规则）！不是 leaded。注意：lead 也可读作 /led/（铅），和过去式 led 同音。
learn.example: She led us to the room. (NOT: leaded)

stage3.prompt: 选出 allow 的正确句型
stage3.q: My parents don't ___ me ___ out late.

learn.meaning: gram. allow sb to do sth（必须加 to）。不说 allow sb doing sth。和 ask/tell/want 同类。
learn.example: They don't allow me to stay out late. (NOT: allow me staying)

stage3.prompt: 选出 apologize 的正确搭配
stage3.q: She ___ for ___ my pen without asking.

learn.meaning: gram. apologize for + V-ing（不是动词原形）。for 是介词，后面用动名词 borrowing。
learn.example: She apologized for borrowing my pen. (NOT: for borrow)

stage3.prompt: 选出 allow 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 允许进入（或出去、通过）。allow sb to do sth 允许某人做某事。
learn.example: The guard allowed us to enter the building.

stage3.prompt: 选出 transport 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 运输；运送（trans- 跨 + port 搬运 → 从一个地方搬到另一个地方）。名词 transportation。
learn.example: The goods were transported by ship.

stage3.prompt: 选出 get down 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 俯身；趴下；跪下（in a fire：发生火灾时的安全动作）。不是简单的"下来"（come down）。
learn.example: If there is smoke, get down low and crawl out.

stage3.prompt: 选出 smoke 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 烟（不可数）。也可作动词"吸烟"。smoke detector 烟雾报警器。
learn.example: We could see smoke coming from the building.

stage3.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查语法点）
stage3.q: 发生火灾时，消防队员教导人们要趴低并爬出去。
options: During a fire, firemen teach people to get down and crawl out.
During a fire, firemen teach people getting down and crawl out.
During a fire, firemen teaches people to get down and crawl out.
During a fire, fireman teach people to get down and crawling out.

learn.word: teach sb to do / get down
learn.meaning: gram. ①teach sb to do（和 allow sb to do 同类）②主语 firemen 复数→ teach 原形 ③get down 俯身 ④crawl 和 get 并列，都用原形
learn.example: Firemen teach people to get down and crawl out.

stage3.prompt: 选出 lead to 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 带着（某人）到（lead-led-led）。注意：lead to 也可指"导致"（lead to sth），意思取决于宾语是人还是物。
learn.example: The guide led us to the exit. / Smoking can lead to health problems.

stage4.prompt: 选出 disaster 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 灾难；灾害（natural disaster 自然灾害）。注意：accident 是"意外事故"，disaster 更严重。
learn.example: The earthquake was a terrible disaster.

stage4.prompt: 选出 extinct 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 已灭绝的；绝种的（extinct = 完全消失；endangered = 濒危，还有存活）。become extinct 灭绝。
learn.example: Dinosaurs became extinct millions of years ago.

stage4.prompt: 选出 source 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 来源；出处（source of... 的来源）。不要和 resource 混淆：source 是来源，resource 是资源。
learn.example: What is the source of this information?

stage4.prompt: 选出 extinct 和 endangered 的区别
stage4.q: Giant pandas are ___, but not ___ yet.

learn.meaning: gram. endangered 濒危的（还有存活），extinct 已灭绝的（没了）。两者都是形容词，但程度完全不同。
learn.example: Pandas are endangered. Dinosaurs are extinct.

stage4.prompt: 选出 honey 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 蜂蜜。不可数名词。honey bee 蜜蜂。也可指"亲爱的"（口语）。
learn.example: Bees make honey from flowers.

stage4.prompt: 选出 material 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 材料；原料（可数/不可数均可）。building materials 建筑材料。
learn.example: Wool is a warm material for winter clothes.

stage4.prompt: 选出 effort 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 艰难的尝试；努力（make an effort to do 努力做某事）。可数名词。
learn.example: They made a great effort to save the animals.

stage4.prompt: 选出 source 和 resource 的区别

learn.meaning: 水是自然资源（resource）。水源用 water source。source = 来源，resource = 资源。常考混淆。
learn.example: Water is a resource. The source of the river is in the mountains.

stage4.prompt: 选出 material 的正确用法
stage4.q: Wool is a good ___ for making warm clothes.

learn.meaning: 语境：羊毛是做衣服的"材料"→ material。不要和 source（来源）、resource（资源）混淆。
learn.example: Wool is a good material for sweaters.

stage4.q: 我们必须努力保护濒危动物，否则它们会灭绝。
options: We must do an effort to protect endangered animals, or they will become extinct.
We must make an effort to protect endangered animals, or they will become extinct.
We must make effort to protect endanger animals, or they will be extincted.
We must make an effort to protect extinct animals, or they will become endangered.

learn.meaning: gram. ①make an effort（不是 do）②endangered animals（濒危，不是 extinct）③become extinct（灭绝，不是 extincted）
learn.example: We must make an effort to protect endangered animals.

stage4.prompt: 选出 effort 的正确搭配
stage4.q: We should ___ an effort to protect endangered animals.

learn.meaning: phr. 努力做某事。固定搭配用 make，不是 do/take。make an effort to do sth。
learn.example: She made an effort to arrive on time. (NOT: did an effort)

stage4.prompt: 选出 type 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 类型；种类（a type of + 名词）。也可作动词"打字"。kind/sort/type 三者都表"种类"。
learn.example: What type of animal is a dolphin?

stage5.prompt: 选出 sometime 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adv. 在某时（指不确定的时间）。注意：sometime ≠ sometimes（有时候）≠ some time（一段时间）。三者常考混淆。
learn.example: Let's meet sometime next week.

stage5.prompt: 选出 probably 在句中的正确位置
stage5.q: The dolphin ___ knows the way back.

learn.meaning: gram. probably 放在行为动词前（knows 前）。如果是 be 动词，放在 be 动词后（is probably）。
learn.example: She probably knows. / She is probably right.

stage5.prompt: 选出正确的词（辨析陷阱）
stage5.q: The ___ of the fire was a cigarette. Firemen made a great ___ to put it out.

learn.meaning: 语境：火灾的"来源"→ source（不是 resource）。消防员"努力"灭火→ make an effort。source 和 resource 是 Unit 4 核心混淆对。
learn.example: The source of the fire / They made an effort.

stage5.prompt: 选出 somewhere 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adv. 在某处；到某处（肯定句）。否定/疑问句用 anywhere。
learn.example: I left my book somewhere in the classroom.

stage5.q: 消防队员可能在某个时候带领搜救队到某处去。
options: Firemen will probably lead the search-and-rescue team somewhere sometime.
Firemen will probably lead the search-and-rescue team anywhere sometime.
Firemen probable lead the search-and-rescue team somewhere sometimes.
Firemen will probably lead the search-and-rescue team somewhere sometimes.

learn.meaning: gram. ①probably 副词（不是 probable）②肯定句用 somewhere ③sometime 某个时间（不是 sometimes 有时候）
learn.example: They will probably lead the team somewhere sometime.

stage5.prompt: 选出 either 和 too 的区别
stage5.q: I'm not scared of sharks. My brother isn't scared ___.

learn.meaning: gram. isn't 否定句 → 用 either（不是 too）。too/also/as well 都用于肯定句。
learn.example: I'm not scared either. (NOT: too) / I'm scared too.

stage5.q: 海豚不害怕鲨鱼。人类也不必害怕。
options: Dolphins is not scared of sharks. Humans doesn't need to be scared either.
Dolphins aren't scared of sharks. Humans don't need to be scared too.
Both A and B are correct.
Dolphins aren't scared of sharks. Humans don't need to be scared either.

learn.meaning: gram. ①否定句尾用 either（不用 too）②Dolphins 复数 + aren't ③Humans 复数 + don't。B 把 either 错用为 too。
learn.example: Dolphins aren't scared. Humans aren't either.

stage5.prompt: 选出 probably 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adv. 很可能；大概（表示很大的可能性）。放在 be 动词后/行为动词前。probable adj. → probably adv.。
learn.example: She is probably at home. / She probably knows the answer.

options: We made a great effort, but the species still became extinct.
We did a great effort, but the species still became extinct.
We made a great effort, but the species still become extincted.
We makes a great effort, but the species still became extinct.

learn.meaning: gram. ①make an effort（不用 do）②became extinct（灭绝，过去时，不是 extincted）③主语 We 复数→ made（不是 makes）
learn.example: We made an effort, but the species became extinct.

stage5.prompt: 选出 either 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adv. 也（用于否定句句尾）。too 用于肯定句。I don't like it either. / I like it too.
learn.example: She doesn't smoke, and I don't either.

stage5.prompt: 选出 sometime/sometimes/some time 的区别

learn.meaning: gram. sometimes 频率副词"有时候"。sometime 指"某个不确定的时间"。some time 指"一段时间"（名词短语）。
learn.example: I sometimes swim. / Let's meet sometime. / I need some time.

stage5.prompt: 选出 somewhere 和 anywhere 的区别

learn.meaning: gram. can't 否定句 → 用 anywhere。肯定句用 somewhere。some- 系列用于肯定，any- 用于否定/疑问。
learn.example: I can't find it anywhere. / I found it somewhere.
